panels.title: Average Wait Time by Route (Current Window)

targets.rawSql: SELECT route || ' ' || dir AS route, ROUND(avg_wait_sec::numeric, 0) AS avg_wait_sec FROM eta_realtime WHERE window_start = (SELECT MAX(window_start) FROM eta_realtime) AND route IS NOT NULL ORDER BY avg_wait_sec DESC

SELECT route, dir, ROUND(avg_wait_sec::numeric, 0) AS avg_wait_sec, sample_count FROM eta_realtime WHERE avg_delay_flag = 1 AND window_start >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours' AND route IS NOT NULL ORDER BY avg_wait_sec DESC
SELECT window_start AS time, route || ' ' || dir AS metric, avg_wait_sec AS value FROM eta_realtime WHERE window_start >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 hours' AND route IS NOT NULL ORDER BY window_start
SELECT route || ' ' || dir AS route, SUM(sample_count) AS total_samples FROM eta_realtime WHERE route IS NOT NULL GROUP BY route, dir ORDER BY total_samples DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS delayed_windows FROM eta_realtime WHERE avg_delay_flag = 1
